Title: Authorizes the city of New York to provide for a residential parking permit system in Queens Community Boards 3 and 4
Summary: Authorizes the city of New York to provide for a residential parking permit system in Queens Community Boards 3 and 4 to reduce hazards and pollution levels.
LawCode: Add §1640-t, V & T L; amd §1270-i, Pub Auth L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law and the public authorities law, in relation to authorizing a residential parking permit system in the city of New York; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
